text:
進撃st-hrn-egt20130629巨人 is the 1st track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack II. It is also the 10th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

st – String instruments
hrn – Horns
egt – Electric Guitar

Musical motifs

The track has 2 remixes: 

TheWeightOfLives (0:00-2:35)
AOTF-s2

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-2:17), and the second part (2:17-4:59), which incorporates Call your name's chorus motif (3:38-4:16).
